title: Gendarmerie 2025
description: A pack with few mods that offers a bit of adventure and building while remaining lightweight
body:
**Gendarmerie 2025** is a lightweight modpack that enhances Minecraft without straying too far from its vanilla charm. Featuring revamped structures, new building tools, and optimized performance, it’s perfect for low-end PCs and players who love exploration and creativity.
Originally created for my Minecraft server with friends, it’s great for both solo adventures and multiplayer fun.
